sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110966" key="fi/leunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φίλ-ευνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n110966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of the marriage-bed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:1:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
